purpose: Define the functional contract for admin review after a shopper marks the questionnaire as completed and before submitido, liquidation or HR sync are treated as final.

included: links between visit, assignment, shopper and HR row
Make sync gate prepared but disabled
excluded: automatic final submitido without HR/admin validation

rules: submitidoSource must be hr or admin_confirmed_hr
submitidoAt must come from HR or an admin-confirmed HR value
questionnaireCompletedAt must exist before submitidoAt unless a human conflict note is attached

phaseARules: A shopper marking questionnaire completed does not equal submitido.
Submitido must be HR-driven or admin-confirmed from HR before liquidation eligibility is final.
A review must keep tenantId and projectId stable from the visit and assignment.
A review must not overwrite HR/platform conflicts silently.
A review action must append auditTrail entries rather than replacing prior decisions.
Make sync events are prepared as gates but not called in this phase without authorization.
Liquidation eligibility starts only after submitido_registered or an explicit admin policy exception documented in auditTrail.
conflictTriggers: visitId or hrRowId belongs to another project
assignment shopperId differs from HR shopper
questionnaireCompletedAt is after submitidoAt without human note
HR has submitido but platform lacks questionnaire completion
platform has completed questionnaire but HR row is missing or not readable
visit was cancelled but has review or submitido activity
duplicate review record for the same visitId without superseded flag
commercializablePrototypeNotes: Admin review should be a generic configurable workflow, not hard-coded only to TyA or Cinepolis.
Project settings should define whether submitido comes from HR, platform review, external system or manual admin confirmation.
The UI should show questionnaire completed, review status, submitido status and liquidation eligibility as separate steps.
The UI should not present Make/HR sync as executed while gates are disabled.
The review action labels can be tenant-specific, but the underlying statuses should remain canonical.
hardStops: Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not call Make from this contract.
Do not update HR from this contract.
Do not mark liquidation as payable only from questionnaireCompletedAt.
Do not treat UI review buttons as production actions until backend gates are authorized.
